## PART 5: DATA FLOW ARCHITECTURE

```
CANDIDATE FLOW:
1. Browse Jobs → /candidate/jobs/recommended (AI match)
2. View Job Detail → /memory/match-breakdown (AI explains match)
3. Apply for Job → /candidate/ai/cover-letter (generate)
                 → /candidate/ai/screening-suggestions (fill answers)
                 → /candidate/auto-fill (pre-fill from history)
4. Track Score → /omniscore/breakdown (view OmniScore)
              → /memory/omniscore-trend (see history)
5. Rate Companies → /omniscore/rate-company (feedback loop)

RECRUITER FLOW:
1. Dashboard → /recruiter/dashboard (overview)
2. Post Job → /recruiter/jobs/generate (AI description)
          → /recruiter/jobs/suggest-skills (AI skills)
          → /recruiter/ai/suggest-questions (AI screening)
3. Review Apps → /recruiter/applications (list with match scores)
             → /recruiter/ai/candidate-summary (AI assessment)
             → /memory/match-breakdown (match details)
             → /memory/recruiter-feedback (feedback loop)
4. Pipeline → /recruiter/jobs/{id}/applications (kanban view)
           → Bulk actions for status changes
5. Analytics → /omniscore/company-dashboard (trust score)
            → /omniscore/leaderboard (candidate rankings)
```
